listeningStage2Data.sentence: I spent two hours looking at the photo _______ with my mom.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 句型為「人 + spend + 時間 + V-ing」，這裡要填入可以翻閱的「相簿」。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 我和媽媽花了兩個小時看這本相簿。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: The loud noise made the cat _______ out of the room quickly.
listeningStage2Data.hint: make 是使役動詞，後面要接原形動詞，這裡指貓咪「溜」出房間。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 巨大的噪音讓貓咪迅速溜出了房間。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: Although the school is a long _______ away, Tim still walks there every day.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 雖然句首用了 although，後面就絕不能加 but。這題需要一個表示「距離」的名詞。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 雖然學校有一段很長的距離，提姆每天仍然走路去上學。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: You can always _______ me when you need help with your English homework.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 這個片語意思是「信賴、依靠」，後面常常會接人。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 當你寫英文功課需要幫助時，你隨時可以信賴我。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: Tina spent her weekend cleaning the thick books on the _______ .
listeningStage2Data.hint: 句型為「人 + spend + 時間 + V-ing」，後面要找一個適合擺放書籍的「書架」。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 蒂娜花了他的週末清理書架上的厚重書籍。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: The teacher's warm voice made the new classroom feel _______ to the students.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 使役動詞 make 後面可以接形容詞來描述感覺，這裡指讓教室感覺「熟悉的」。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 老師溫暖的聲音讓學生們覺得新教室很熟悉。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: Although we played _______ a very strong team, we still won the game.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 請注意 although 和 but 不能在同一個句子裡出現。此處需要表示「對抗」的介系詞。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 雖然我們對抗一個非常強的隊伍，我們最後還是贏了比賽。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: I haven't seen my dear cousin _______ because she moved to another city.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 這個副詞表示「最近」，常用在否定句或現在完成式當中。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 我最近沒看到我親愛的表姊，因為她搬到另一個城市了。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: The sad story made me feel that the bad man was too _______ .
listeningStage2Data.hint: 使役動詞 make 後面接形容詞，用來形容故事中的壞人非常「殘忍的」。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 這個悲傷的故事讓我感覺那個壞人太殘忍了。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: The kind boy spent all his pocket money on a _______ for his smart dog.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 句型為「人 + spend + 金錢 + on + 名詞」，這裡指花錢買一個給狗的「獎勵」。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 這個善良的男孩花了他所有的零用錢在給他聰明狗兒的獎賞上。

listeningStage3Data.title: A Treasure on the Shelf (書架上的寶藏)

articleContent.en: Leo spent his Saturday afternoon cleaning his bedroom.
articleContent.zh: 里歐花了星期六下午的時間清理他的臥室。

articleContent.en: He saw a huge pile of old books on the top shelf.
articleContent.zh: 他看到最上面的書架上有一大堆舊書。

articleContent.en: Although the shelf was very high, he still climbed up to clean it.
articleContent.zh: 雖然書架很高，他還是爬上去清理。

articleContent.en: Suddenly, he found a very familiar photo album behind the books.
articleContent.zh: 突然間，他在書後面發現了一本非常熟悉的相簿。

articleContent.en: The beautiful photos made him feel very happy.
articleContent.zh: 那些美麗的照片讓他感到非常開心。

articleContent.en: He decided to contact his childhood friend right away.
articleContent.zh: 他決定立刻聯絡他童年的朋友。

questions.question: Who cleaned the bedroom on Saturday afternoon? (關於人)
questions.correct: Leo

questions.question: What did Leo decide to do after looking at the photos? (關於事)
questions.correct: Contact his childhood friend.

questions.question: When did Leo find the old photo album? (關於時)
questions.correct: On Saturday afternoon.

questions.question: Where did Leo find the familiar photo album? (關於地)
options: Behind a pile of books on the top shelf.
questions.correct: Behind a pile of books on the top shelf.

questions.question: What object did Leo find behind the books? (關於物)
questions.correct: A familiar photo album.

listeningStage3Data.title: Finding the Lost Puppy (尋找迷路的小狗)

articleContent.en: Tina lives in a house that is a long distance from the city.
articleContent.zh: 蒂娜住在一間距離城市很遠的房子裡。

articleContent.en: Recently, her kind neighbor lost a cute puppy.
articleContent.zh: 最近，她善良的鄰居弄丟了一隻可愛的小狗。

articleContent.en: The neighbor offered a special reward for finding the dog.
articleContent.zh: 鄰居提供了特別的獎勵給找到狗的人。

articleContent.en: Tina wanted to look for the dog, so she had to sneak out of the house quietly at night.
articleContent.zh: 蒂娜想去找那隻狗，所以她必須在半夜悄悄溜出家門。

articleContent.en: The cold wind made her feel chilly, but she didn't give up.
articleContent.zh: 寒冷的風讓她覺得寒意刺骨，但她沒有放棄。

articleContent.en: In the end, she found the puppy and knew she could count on her dog-finding skills.
articleContent.zh: 最後，她找到了小狗，並且知道她可以信賴自己找狗的技巧。

questions.question: Who lost a cute puppy in the story? (關於人)
questions.correct: Tina's kind neighbor.

questions.question: What did Tina have to do to look for the puppy? (關於事)
options: Sneak out of the house quietly.
questions.correct: Sneak out of the house quietly.

questions.question: When did Tina sneak out of the house? (關於時)
questions.correct: At night.

questions.question: Where is Tina's house located? (關於地)
options: A long distance from the city.
questions.correct: A long distance from the city.

questions.question: What did the neighbor offer to give as an incentive? (關於物)
questions.correct: A special reward.

articleContent.en: Captain Hook was a cruel man on a big pirate ship.
articleContent.zh: 虎克船長是一艘大海盜船上一個殘忍的人。

articleContent.en: Although he was mean, his crew still had to count on him during storms.
articleContent.zh: 雖然他很刻薄，他的船員在暴風雨期間仍然必須信賴他。

articleContent.en: Yesterday, the ship fought against a terrible storm at sea.
articleContent.zh: 昨天，這艘船在海上與一場可怕的暴風雨對抗。

articleContent.en: The dangerous waves made the crew feel very scared.
articleContent.zh: 危險的海浪讓船員們感到非常害怕。

articleContent.en: The captain spent three hours holding the heavy wheel to save the ship.
articleContent.zh: 船長花了三個小時握著沉重的方向盤來拯救這艘船。

articleContent.en: Finally, the ship sailed away safely at an average speed.
articleContent.zh: 最後，這艘船以平均的速度安全地航行離開。

questions.question: Who was the cruel leader of the pirate ship? (關於人)
questions.correct: Captain Hook.

questions.question: What did the captain do to save the ship? (關於事)
options: Spent three hours holding the heavy wheel.
questions.correct: Spent three hours holding the heavy wheel.

questions.question: When did the ship fight against the terrible storm? (關於時)
questions.correct: Yesterday.

questions.question: Where did this dangerous event happen? (關於地)
options: At sea on a pirate ship.
questions.correct: At sea on a pirate ship.

questions.question: What object did the captain hold for three hours? (關於物)
options: The heavy wheel of the ship.
A big book from the shelf.
questions.correct: The heavy wheel of the ship.

readingStage1Data.hint: 句型為「人 + spend + 時間 + V-ing」，這裡要填入可以翻閱的「相簿」。
readingStage1Data.translation: 我和媽媽花了兩個小時看這本相簿。

readingStage1Data.translation: 蒂娜花了他的週末清理書架上的厚重書籍。

readingStage1Data.hint: 使役動詞 make 後面可以接形容詞來描述感覺，這裡指讓教室感覺「熟悉的」。
readingStage1Data.translation: 老師溫暖的聲音讓學生們覺得新教室很熟悉。

readingStage1Data.sentence: Although we played _______ a very strong team, we still won the game.
readingStage1Data.hint: 請注意 although 和 but 不能在同一個句子裡出現。此處需要表示「對抗」的介系詞。
readingStage1Data.translation: 雖然我們對抗一個非常強的隊伍，我們最後還是贏了比賽。

readingStage1Data.sentence: I haven't seen my dear cousin _______ because she moved to another city.
readingStage1Data.hint: 這個副詞表示「最近」，常用在否定句或現在完成式當中。
readingStage1Data.translation: 我最近沒看到我親愛的表姊，因為她搬到另一個城市了。

readingStage1Data.sentence: The sad story made me feel that the bad man was too _______ .
readingStage1Data.hint: 使役動詞 make 後面接形容詞，用來形容故事中的壞人非常「殘忍的」。
readingStage1Data.translation: 這個悲傷的故事讓我感覺那個壞人太殘忍了。

readingStage1Data.sentence: The kind boy spent all his pocket money on a _______ for his smart dog.
readingStage1Data.hint: 句型為「人 + spend + 金錢 + on + 名詞」，這裡指花錢買一個給狗的「獎勵」。
readingStage1Data.translation: 這個善良的男孩花了他所有的零用錢在給他聰明狗兒的獎賞上。

readingStage2Data.title: The Secret Map of Treasure Island (寶島的秘密地圖)
readingStage2Data.article: Jim found an old map on the highest {{1}} in the room. Although he was scared, he decided to look for the treasure. He had to {{2}} onto the pirate ship at night. On the ship, a pirate with a sharp {{3}} made Jim clean the deck. Jim spent two days looking for the gold. Finally, he found a large pile of gold coins.

blanks.hint: 用來放置書本或物品的架子
blanks.translation: 吉姆在房間裡最高的架子上發現了一張舊地圖。

blanks.hint: 為了不被發現而偷偷摸摸地潛入
blanks.translation: 他必須在夜裡偷偷潛入海盜船。

blanks.hint: 鐵鉤，常出現在獨眼海盜的故事中
blanks.translation: 在船上，一個帶著鋒利鐵鉤的海盜叫吉姆去清理甲板。

readingStage2Data.title: The Prisoner's Hope (囚犯的希望)
readingStage2Data.article: Edmond was locked in a dark {{1}} for many years. The {{2}} guards never let him talk to anyone. Recently, he heard a strange sound through the stone wall. It was a {{3}} voice of an old man digging a tunnel. They talked about freedom and a secret treasure in the distance.

blanks.translation: 愛德盟被關在黑暗的監獄裡很多年。
殘忍的警衛從不讓他和任何人說話。
那是一個正在挖隧道的白髮老人的熟悉聲音。

readingStage2Data.title: The Clever Detective (聰明的偵探)
readingStage2Data.article: Sherlock Holmes was not an {{1}} detective because he noticed everything. Dr. Watson knew he could always {{2}} Holmes to solve any crime. They found an old photo {{3}} that belonged to the dangerous suspect. The suspect tried to hide against the wall when they arrived. Holmes immediately tried to contact the local police for help.

blanks.translation: 夏洛克·福爾摩斯不是一個普通的偵探，因為他注意到每件事。
華生醫生知道他總是可以指望福爾摩斯來解決任何犯罪。

blanks.hint: 用來放照片或收集物品的冊子、相簿
blanks.translation: 他們發現了一個屬於危險嫌疑犯的舊相簿。

readingStage3Data.title: The Secret Map of Treasure Island (寶島的秘密地圖)

articleContent.en: Jim found an old map on the highest shelf in the room.
articleContent.zh: 吉姆在房間裡最高的架子上發現了一張舊地圖。

articleContent.en: Although he was scared, he decided to look for the treasure.
articleContent.zh: 雖然他很害怕，但他還是決定去尋找寶藏。

articleContent.en: He had to sneak onto the pirate ship at night.
articleContent.zh: 他必須在夜裡偷偷潛入海盜船。

articleContent.en: On the ship, a pirate with a sharp hook made Jim clean the deck.
articleContent.zh: 在船上，一個帶著鋒利鐵鉤的海盜叫吉姆去清理甲板。

articleContent.en: Jim spent two days looking for the gold.
articleContent.zh: 吉姆花了兩天的時間尋找黃金。

articleContent.en: Finally, he found a large pile of gold coins.
articleContent.zh: 最後，他發現了一大堆金幣。

questions.question: Who found the old secret map?
options: Jim found it in the room.
questions.correct: Jim found it in the room.

questions.question: What did Jim spend two days looking for?
options: He spent two days looking for the gold.
He spent two days looking for a new job.
He spent two days looking for his lost cat.
questions.correct: He spent two days looking for the gold.

questions.question: When did Jim have to sneak onto the pirate ship?
options: He had to do it at night.
He had to do it in the morning.
He had to do it during lunch time.
questions.correct: He had to do it at night.

questions.question: Where did Jim find the secret map?
options: On the highest shelf in the room.
Under a large pile of sand on the beach.
questions.correct: On the highest shelf in the room.

questions.question: What did the pirate with a hook make Jim do?
options: He made Jim clean the deck.
He made Jim cook a big dinner.
He made Jim sing a song for the pirates.
questions.correct: He made Jim clean the deck.

articleContent.en: Edmond was locked in a dark prison for many years.
articleContent.zh: 愛德盟被關在黑暗的監獄裡很多年。

articleContent.en: The cruel guards never let him talk to anyone.
articleContent.zh: 殘忍的警衛從不讓他和任何人說話。

articleContent.en: Recently, he heard a strange sound through the stone wall.
articleContent.zh: 最近，他透過石牆聽到了奇怪的聲音。

articleContent.en: It was a familiar voice of an old man digging a tunnel.
articleContent.zh: 那是一個正在挖隧道的白髮老人的熟悉聲音。

articleContent.en: They talked about freedom and a secret treasure in the distance.
articleContent.zh: 他們談論著自由和遠處的秘密寶藏。

questions.question: Who was locked in the dark prison for many years?
options: A cruel guard was locked there.
A clever detective was locked there.
questions.correct: Edmond was locked there.

questions.question: What did Edmond hear through the stone wall recently?
options: He heard the sound of loud rain.
questions.correct: He heard a strange sound.

questions.question: How long was Edmond locked in the prison?
options: He was locked there for many years.
He was locked there for two days.
He was locked there for only one week.
questions.correct: He was locked there for many years.

questions.question: Where did they say the secret treasure was located?
options: The treasure was in the distance.
The treasure was on the top shelf.
The treasure was inside the guard's office.
questions.correct: The treasure was in the distance.

questions.question: What was the old man doing when Edmond heard him?
options: He was looking at an old photo album.
questions.correct: He was digging a tunnel.

articleContent.en: Sherlock Holmes was not an average detective because he noticed everything.
articleContent.zh: 夏洛克·福爾摩斯不是一個普通的偵探，因為他注意到每件事。

articleContent.en: Dr. Watson knew he could always count on Holmes to solve any crime.
articleContent.zh: 華生醫生知道他總是可以指望福爾摩斯來解決任何犯罪。

articleContent.en: They found an old photo album that belonged to the dangerous suspect.
articleContent.zh: 他們發現了一個屬於危險嫌疑犯的舊相簿。

articleContent.en: The suspect tried to hide against the wall when they arrived.
articleContent.zh: 當他們到達時，嫌疑犯試圖靠著牆躲藏。

articleContent.en: Holmes immediately tried to contact the local police for help.
articleContent.zh: 福爾摩斯立刻試圖聯絡當地警方尋求幫助。

questions.question: Who knew he could always count on Holmes?
options: The local police chief knew it.
questions.correct: Dr. Watson knew it.

questions.question: What did the detective find that belonged to the suspect?
options: They found an old photo album.
They found a sharp iron hook.
They found a large pile of gold coins.
questions.correct: They found an old photo album.

questions.question: When did the suspect try to hide against the wall?
options: When he heard a strange sound through the wall.
Before he stole the treasure from the ship.
questions.correct: When Holmes and Watson arrived.

questions.question: Where did the suspect try to hide when discovered?
options: He tried to hide against the wall.
He tried to hide in a dark prison cell.
He tried to hide on the highest shelf.
questions.correct: He tried to hide against the wall.

questions.question: Why was Sherlock Holmes not an average detective?
options: Because he noticed every small detail.
Because he spent a lot of money every day.
Because he was a very cruel and mean man.
questions.correct: Because he noticed every small detail.
